title: Enforce test quality gate before live E2E

requirements: Gate 4 validation layers: [L0, L1, L2 entry readiness, L3 entry readiness]
Check 5 must-pass items: [build command present, focused Vitest commands present, read-only safety preserved, disposable-copy strategy documented, max_iterations=10 recorded]
Review 3 blocker severities from IMPL-001.3: [must-fix-before-e2e, can-fix-during-IMPL-002, informational]
Bind 1 downstream task to the gate result: [IMPL-002]
acceptance: 4 validation layers are explicitly scored: verify by reviewing gate outcomes for [L0, L1, L2 entry readiness, L3 entry readiness]
5 must-pass items are checked: verify by matching [build command, focused Vitest commands, read-only safety, disposable-copy strategy, max_iterations=10]
1 go/no-go decision is produced: verify by enumerating exactly one of [go, no-go]
1 downstream handoff exists for IMPL-002: verify by matching the gate result to IMPL-002 readiness
0 production source files are modified by the review task: verify by limiting output to workflow artifacts only

context: Static validation findings and severity buckets are available
Potential blockers are already classified for gating

shared_context.execution_policy: No live E2E until gate passes
conventions: Do not rerun full analysis when prior task already produced blocker findings
Keep the decision binary so IMPL-002 can start or stop cleanly

artifacts.usage: Gate the written plan against required commands and safety constraints
Use static findings and blocker buckets as gate input

pre_analysis.action: Load the current test-fix plan and ensure required commands and limits are written down
Load the static validation task and use it as the quality-gate input
Verify required commands, safety split, and max_iterations value are present before live execution

implementation_approach.title: Evaluate layer readiness
implementation_approach.description: Score L0, L1, L2 entry readiness, and L3 entry readiness using only the written plan and inherited blocker inventory.
modification_points: Score 4 layers: [L0, L1, L2 entry readiness, L3 entry readiness]
Check 5 must-pass items: [build command, focused Vitest commands, read-only safety, disposable-copy strategy, max_iterations=10]
Consume 3 blocker severities from the inherited validation task
logic_flow: Load the plan and validation findings
Evaluate each layer against must-pass criteria

implementation_approach.title: Issue go/no-go decision
implementation_approach.description: Produce a single gate result for IMPL-002 and identify the exact condition set behind it.
logic_flow: Connect the result to IMPL-002 start conditions

test_commands.run_tests: pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run test/agents-meta.test.ts
